prestazioni: Engine: M64/20 (3.8L air-cooled flat-six) with a custom-built 4.0L stroker kit using Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (96.5mm bore, 96mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 450+ hp on 100-octane fuel with a custom Motec M150 ECU managing individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from Jenvey Dynamics (48mm diameter) and a custom intake manifold by GT Cylinder Heads.

Forced induction: Single-turbo setup using a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (82mm compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler from Bell Intercoolers, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fabspeed Motorsport with a straight-pipe design and a valved X-pipe for track use.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for the 993 RS Clubsport chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts from Tarrett Engineering. Rear subframe reinforcement with a custom aluminum brace by 993R Performance, and a front strut tower brace from Elephant Racing. Braking upgraded to 380mm two-piece rotors from AP Racing with 6-piston calipers up front and 355mm rotors with 4-piston calipers at the rear, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber widebody kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) in the 'Kawasaki' style, featuring extended fenders, custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a ducktail rear wing with a carbon fiber gurney flap. Underbody diffusers by 9ff Performance for improved downforce.

Exterior: Custom paint in Porsche 'Gulf Blue' (original 917 livery color) with hand-painted white stripes and gold pinstriping by Stripes Unlimited. Lightweight carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct for engine bay cooling, and a custom rear bumper with integrated dual exhaust exits by TechArt.

Interior: Full carbon fiber weave interior by Porsche Classic with Recaro SRD Evo II carbon-Kevlar bucket seats (993-specific mounting brackets), Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Matter Fab with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Steering wheel replaced with a Momo Prototipo 350mm suede wheel with a quick-release hub, and the dashboard stripped of non-essentials with a digital AIM MXS Strada dash display.
